title: Testimonials
metaDescription: Aging-In-Place Remodeling is San Diego's most trusted home accessibility remodeler. Read testimonials from our clients.

testimonials.quote: We had Aging-In-Place Remodeling do some home modifications and install a Stiltz lift in our home. The process was seamless and very professional. The Stiltz lift was installed in 4 days as promised and provides an easy way for us to go between the floors in our home. The crew that worked on this installation was dedicated to get the job done in 4 days and worked tirelessly to do it. From my first contact with Tyler Owen to the end of this project, I have been very impressed with this company. The service they offer to anyone wanting to stay in their home, despite aging or illness, is so valuable.
testimonials.author: Michelle B.

testimonials.quote: Can I say that Aging in Place is Excellent quality, Good Value, Professional, Responsive and On time? We were looking for an alternative to a stair chair lift and found Tyler Owen and his company, Aging in Place. They have been in business 18 years and know what they are doing. Tyler came out multiple times to work out the plans. Six days later our lift was ready to ride. It is quiet, smooth and very high tech.
testimonials.author: Janet W.

testimonials.quote: Teams were organized, coordinated and very friendly. They completed a three-person elevator installation in four days.
testimonials.author: Dr. David E.

testimonials.quote: Hard to find a company that actually does what they promise and does it well.
testimonials.author: Lorin P.

testimonials.quote: Praised punctuality, cleanliness, and workmanship quality throughout the entire project.
testimonials.author: Bill & Judy M.

testimonials.quote: Highlighted on-time, within-budget completion of accessibility modifications.
testimonials.author: Eva S.

testimonials.quote: Commended bathroom accessibility expertise and professional approach.
testimonials.author: Tomas T.

testimonials.quote: Appreciated creative design solutions and two-day installation timeline.
testimonials.author: Judy H.
